calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-10-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Sep-20-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Karen Farnsworth.
Josh Brownstein, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Mohammed Shamma and Heidi Saleh.
Plaintiff's Witness: Mohammed Shamma, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendant: Christopher Levy as follows:
Damages $27,500.00
Prejudgment Interest $2,861.40
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs $474.49 for a total of $33,660.89
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2007 Continued To Oct-19-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
